name: Amul Taaza Full Cream Milk 1L
description: Fresh full cream cow's milk with 6% fat. Pasteurised and homogenised. Rich in calcium and protein. Ideal for tea, coffee, and cooking.

name: So Good Almond Milk Unsweetened 1L
description: Smooth unsweetened almond milk made from real California almonds. Zero lactose, zero dairy, low in calories. Perfect for smoothies, cereals, and baking.

name: Organic India Tulsi Green Tea 25 Bags
description: Certified organic green tea blended with holy basil (tulsi). Rich in antioxidants, adaptogenic herbs support immunity and calm focus. No artificial flavours.

name: Slurrp Farm Millet Pancake Mix 200g
description: Ready-to-cook pancake mix made from jowar, ragi, and oats. No refined flour, no preservatives, no added sugar. Just add water and cook in 5 minutes.

name: True Elements Rolled Oats 1kg
description: 100% whole grain rolled oats. No added sugar, no preservatives, no artificial flavours. High in beta-glucan fibre for heart health and sustained energy.

name: Epigamia Greek Yogurt Mango 85g
description: Thick, strained Greek yogurt in a luscious mango flavour. Contains live probiotic cultures for gut health. 7g protein per cup. No gelatin, no artificial thickeners.

name: Down To Earth Organic Red Lentils 500g
description: Certified organic red masoor dal sourced from Madhya Pradesh farms. Stone-sorted and triple-washed. Rich in plant protein and iron. No pesticides, no chemical fertilisers.

name: Soulfull Ragi Bites Chocolate 150g
description: Crunchy ragi-based snack bites in chocolate flavour. Made with whole grain finger millet (ragi), naturally rich in calcium. No maida, no palm oil.

name: Wellbeing Nutrition Moringa Superfood Powder 100g
description: Cold-pressed organic moringa (drumstick) leaf powder. Contains 9× more iron than spinach, 17× more calcium than milk. Add a teaspoon to smoothies, dal, or water daily.

name: Conscious Food Cold-Pressed Coconut Oil 500ml
description: Virgin cold-pressed coconut oil extracted without heat or chemicals. Retains natural aroma and medium-chain fatty acids (MCTs). Ideal for cooking, bulletproof coffee, and skin care.
